summary: Mutual funds will now be permitted to offer both value and contra mutual funds as long as the scheme portfolio overlap between the two schemes is not more than 50%.

summary: India's Union Budget emphasizes youth empowerment and entrepreneurship, recognizing the potential of its young population as a key driver of economic growth. title: US shares, undisclosed dividend: is BMA penalty inevitable?
summary: An Indian investor disclosed foreign shares but not the associated dividend income, assuming it was taxed in the US. The ₹20 lakh threshold for penalty under the Black Money Act pertains to foreign assets, not income. What can be done to mitigate penalties?

title: I never paid for a flight ticket in past 10 years: Ashish Lath, CEO, SaveSage
summary: In the past 10 years, Ashish Lath took 400 flights without spending any money, which includes around 80 international ones. He stayed in hotels for 100 nights without paying anything, getting 23% return on expenses in value terms by using 15 credit cards.

title: Gold the fastest moving loan product for banks in January
summary: Gold loans surged 128% year over year, while renewable-energy lending rose 62%. Export credit declined 17.2%. Total bank credit increased 14%, outpacing deposit growth. Retail loans grew 15%, corporate lending improved to 12%, and the gems-and-jewellery and engineering sectors each posted 36% growth

title: Average lending rates on new loans firm up
summary: January saw Mumbai's new rupee-loan rates climb, propelled mainly by state-owned lenders. By contrast, rates on existing loans dipped slightly and deposit rates declined a touch. The move unfolds in the RBI's policy backdrop, after its prior repo-rate reduction.

title: Can AI beat a great investor? Here's what billionaire Howard Marks says

title: Shriram Pistons raises Rs 1,000 crore for Antolin buy
summary: Shriram Pistons and Rings raised Rs 1,000 crore via 18- and 24-month NCDs from mutual funds to partly finance its Rs 1,670-crore acquisition of Grupo Antolin’s India entities. The deal diversifies SPRL into automotive interiors, reducing EV transition risks and strengthening its business profile.
